name: sim_weyl_pairwise_g2_rescaling_coupling
scope_note: Pairwise coupling probe: W(G2) <-> Weyl conformal rescaling. G2 Cartan matrix [[2,-1],[-3,2]]; A21=-3 encodes long/short ratio sqrt(3). Under UNIFORM Omega: Cartan entries preserved (numerator/denominator cancel). Under NON-UNIFORM Omega: A21 -> -3*(O2/O1), A12 -> -1*(O1/O2), both broken. z3 UNSAT: A21=-3 AND non-uniform Omega simultaneously. Clifford: uniform Omega commutes with G2 reflections; non-uniform breaks commutation.

pytorch.reason: Apply Omega^2 rescaling to G2 root metric; check Cartan matrix entries A21=-3 and A12=-1 after rescaling via autograd; verify uniform Omega preserves symmetry while non-uniform Omega changes the -3 entry by Omega2^2/Omega1^2

pyg.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

z3.reason: UNSAT: A21=-3 AND A12=-1 AND Omega non-uniform simultaneously; non-uniform Omega scales A21 by Omega2^2/Omega1^2 != 1, changing it from -3; encode as: A21_scaled * Omega1^2 == -3 * Omega2^2 with Omega1 != Omega2 AND A21_scaled == -3

cvc5.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

sympy.reason: G2 Cartan matrix [[2,-1],[-3,2]]; symbolic Omega rescaling: <alpha_i, alpha_j>_Omega = Omega_i^2 * <alpha_i,alpha_j>; show A21 = 2*Omega_2^2*<alpha2,alpha1> / (Omega_1^2*<alpha1,alpha1>); confirm uniform Omega cancels; derive non-uniform correction factor

clifford.reason: Omega as grade-0 Clifford scalar; G2 long-root reflection as grade-1 sandwich; commutator [Omega, s_alpha2] = 0 for uniform Omega (scalar commutes with all); for non-uniform Omega(x): Omega acts differently before vs after reflection

geomstats.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

e3nn.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

rustworkx.reason: Graph encoding of Omega-stability: nodes = {G2_root, rescaled_root}; edges = 'same under Omega' (uniform) or 'different under Omega' (non-uniform); verify graph structure changes when Omega is non-uniform

xgi.reason: Hyperedge {s_alpha_G2, Omega_conformal, A21_entry}: 3-way coupling between the G2 reflection, the rescaling, and the Cartan entry; records which Cartan entries are preserved vs broken under rescaling

toponetx.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

gudhi.reason: not used in this Weyl geometry probe; deferred to integration sims

P2_pytorch_uniform_omega_preserves_carta.reason: Uniform Omega rescaling: A_ij * (Omega/Omega) = A_ij; Cartan entries preserved exactly

P3_pytorch_nonuniform_omega_breaks_carta.reason: Non-uniform Omega: A21_Omega = A21 * (omega2/omega1) != -3 when omega1 != omega2

P4_pytorch_g2_reflection_is_isometry.reason: W(G2) reflections are isometries: |s1(v)| = |v| for all test vectors (standard metric)

P5_pytorch_uniform_omega_commutes_with_i.reason: Uniform Omega and W(G2) isometry commute in norm: |Omega*s(v)| = Omega*|v| = |Omega*v|

P6_sympy_uniform_omega_cancels_symbolica.reason: Symbolic: A21 under uniform Omega = 2*Omega^2*(-3/2) / (Omega^2*1) = -3; Omega cancels

P7_sympy_nonuniform_omega_breaks_a21.reason: Symbolic: A21 under non-uniform Omega = -3 * (O2/O1); breaks from -3 when O1 != O2

P8_clifford_uniform_omega_commutes_with_.reason: Uniform Omega (grade-0 scalar) commutes with G2 Clifford reflection: Omega*s(v) = s(Omega*v)

P9_rustworkx_omega_stability_graph.reason: Graph: alpha1(short) <-> alpha2(long); uniform Omega = stable; non-uniform Omega = broken edge

P10_xgi_g2_omega_coupling_hyperedges.reason: XGI encodes: G2 long-root/uniform-Omega/A21 coupling and G2 long-root/nonuniform-Omega/A21 breakage

N1_z3_unsat_a21_preserved_under_nonunifo.reason: UNSAT: A21=-3*O2/O1 AND A21=-3 AND O1!=O2 is impossible; non-uniform Omega breaks A21

N2_pytorch_nonuniform_omega_changes_a21.reason: Non-uniform Omega (1.0, 3.0) changes A21 from -3 to -9: G2 asymmetry is broken

N3_pytorch_nonuniform_omega_changes_a12.reason: Non-uniform Omega also changes A12 from -1: both G2 Cartan entries are broken simultaneously

N4_sympy_g2_asymmetry_preserved_under_no.reason: A21_Omega - A12_Omega = -3*O2/O1 + O1/O2 is generically nonzero: G2 asymmetry persists (differently)

N5_clifford_nonuniform_omega_breaks_comm.reason: Non-uniform Omega (grade-0+grade-2 bivector in Cl(2)) breaks Omega*s(v) = s(Omega*v): not G2-equivariant

N6_rustworkx_nonuniform_breaks_stability.reason: Under non-uniform Omega, both A12 and A21 edges are broken: full G2 Cartan structure lost

B1_pytorch_omega_one_preserves_cartan.reason: Omega=1 (identity rescaling) preserves A12=-1 and A21=-3: trivial boundary condition

B2_pytorch_omega_near_zero_preserves_car.reason: Near-zero uniform Omega still preserves Cartan entries: ratio cancels at all scales

B3_pytorch_limit_nonuniform_approaches_u.reason: As O2/O1 -> 1 (limit to uniform), A21_Omega -> -3: continuous recovery at boundary

B4_sympy_special_ratio_where_cartan_symm.reason: Special Omega2/Omega1 = 1/sqrt(3) makes A21_Omega = A12_Omega: accidental symmetry boundary

B5_z3_sat_uniform_omega_and_a21_minus3.reason: SAT: uniform Omega AND A21=-3 are simultaneously consistent; no contradiction at the boundary

B6_clifford_uniform_omega_commutes_with_.reason: Uniform Omega commutes with G2 short-root s1 too: boundary condition holds for both simple roots

B7_xgi_uniform_omega_g2_compatibility_hy.reason: XGI: uniform Omega is compatible with both G2 simple roots; both Cartan entries preserved
